provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Public Recreation Grounds (Katesh Township) Order.

Each of the areas of public land in Katesh Township described in the Schedule is hereby declared to be a public recreation ground for the purposes of the Public Recreation Grounds Act. Schedule All that area of land in Block "A" within the Katesh Township identified as plot number 67 on survey plan No. E23120/3, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development. All that area of land in Block "G" within the Katesh Township identified as plot number 122 on survey plan No. E 20 120/4, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development. All that area of land in Block "H" within the Katesh Township identified as plot number 263 on survey plan No. E 23 120/6, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Land, Housing and Urban Development.
